lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਤੂ ਸੋਈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sagalee jot jaataa too soee miliaa bhaae subhaae |
lines.english: Your Light is in everyone; through it, You are known. Through love, You are easily met.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਜਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saajan kau bal jaaeeai saach mile ghar aae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to my Friend; He has come home to meet with those who are true. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੋਹਿਅੜੀ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਦੇਖਿ ਰਹੰਸੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har mohiarree saach sabad tthaakur dekh rahansee raam |
lines.english: She is fascinated with the True Word of the Lord's Shabad; gazing upon her Lord and Master, she is filled with joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਆਇਅੜੇ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਤਾ ਧਨ ਖਰੀ ਸਰਸੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ghar aaeiarre saajanaa taa dhan kharee sarasee raam |
lines.english: When her Friend comes to her home, the bride is very pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਮਾਰਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਘਰੁ ਛਾਇਆ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਬਿਧਾਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: avagan maar gunee ghar chhaaeaa poorai purakh bidhaatai |
lines.english: Her faults and demerits are eradicated, and she roofs her home with virtue, through the Perfect Lord, the Architect of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹੰਸੀ ਖਰੀ ਸਰਸੀ ਜਾ ਰਾਵੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੈ ॥
lines.translit: gun sang rahansee kharee sarasee jaa raavee rang raatai |
lines.english: She is filled with virtuous joy, and is totally pleased, when she is ravished and enjoyed by her Lord, and imbued with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਸਕਰ ਮਾਰਿ ਵਸੀ ਪੰਚਾਇਣਿ ਅਦਲੁ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tasakar maar vasee panchaaein adal kare veechaare |
lines.english: Conquering the thieves, she dwells as the mistress of her home, and administers justice wisely.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam nisataaraa guramat mileh piaare |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Lord's Name, she is emancipated; through the Guru's Teachings, she meets her Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਅੜਾ ਬਾਲੜੀਏ ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: var paaeiarraa baalarree aasaa manasaa pooree raam |
lines.english: The young bride has found her Husband Lord; her hopes and desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਿ ਰਾਵਿਅੜੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਲੀ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਨਹ ਦੂਰੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: pir raaviarree sabad ralee rav rahiaa neh dooree raam |
lines.english: She enjoys and ravishes her Husband Lord, and blends into the Word of the Shabad, pervading and permeating everywhere; the Lord is not far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸੋਈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਨਾਰਿ ਸਬਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh door na hoee ghatt ghatt soee tis kee naar sabaaee |
lines.english: God is not far away; He is in each and every heart. All are His brides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰਸੀਆ ਆਪੇ ਰਾਵੇ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape raseea aape raave jiau tis dee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: He Himself is the Enjoyer, He Himself ravishes and enjoys; this is His glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰ ਅਡੋਲੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: amar addol amol apaaraa gur poorai sach paaeeai |
lines.english: He is imperishable, immovable, invaluable and infinite. The True Lord is obtained through the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਜੋਗ ਸਜੋਗੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak aape jog sajogee nadar kare liv laaeeai |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, He Himself unites in Union; by His Glance of Grace, He lovingly attunes them to Himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਉਚੜੀਐ ਮਾੜੜੀਐ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਆ ਸਿਰਤਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: pir ucharreeai maarrarreeai tihu loaa sirataajaa raam |
lines.english: My Husband Lord dwells in the loftiest balcony; He is the Supreme Lord of the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਿਸਮ ਭਈ ਦੇਖਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਅਗਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: hau bisam bhee dekh gunaa anahad sabad agaajaa raam |
lines.english: I am amazed, gazing upon His glorious excellence; the unstruck sound current of the Shabad vibrates and resonates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: sabad veechaaree karanee saaree raam naam neesaano |
lines.english: I contemplate the Shabad, and perform sublime deeds; I am blessed with the insignia, the banner of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਰਵਾਨਾ ਨਾ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਜਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: pat mat pooree pooraa paravaanaa naa aavai naa jaasee |
lines.english: Perfect is my honor, perfect is my intellect and password. I shall not have to come or go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਖੋਟੇ ਨਹੀ ਠਾਹਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa khotte nahee tthaahar naam ratan paravaano |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the false find no place of rest; only the jewel of the Naam brings acceptance and renown.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੈਸੇ ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੪॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh aap pachhaanai prabh jaise avinaasee |4|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh understands her own self; she becomes like her Imperishable Lord God. ||4||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee chhant mahalaa 1 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Chhant, First Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਜਗੁ ਧੰਧੜੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin keea tin dekhiaa jag dhandharrai laaeaa |
lines.english: The One who created the world, watches over it; He enjoins the people of the world to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਤਨਿ ਚੰਦੁ ਦੀਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: daan terai ghatt chaananaa tan chand deepaaeaa |
lines.english: Your gifts, O Lord, illuminate the heart, and the moon casts its light on the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦੋ ਦੀਪਾਇਆ ਦਾਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਉਠਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chando deepaaeaa daan har kai dukh andheraa utth geaa |
lines.english: The moon glows, by the Lord's gift, and the darkness of suffering is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੀਵਾਹੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੋਭ ਸੇਤੀ ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: veevaahu hoaa sobh setee panch sabadee aaeaa |
lines.english: The wedding is performed with glorious splendor; He has arrived, accompanied by the vibrations of the Panch Shabad, the Five Primal Sounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਜੰਞ ਲਾੜੇ ਨਾਲਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਪਰਖਿ ਮੋਹਣੀਐ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gun jany laarre naal sohai parakh mohaneeai leaa |
lines.english: The marriage party of virtue looks beautiful with the Groom; He chooses His enticing bride with care.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਮੀਤਾ ਅਵਰੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree saajanaa meetaa avareetaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my pure friends, the immaculate Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਜਗੁ ਧੰਧੜੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin keea tin dekhiaa jag dhandharrai laaeaa |1|
lines.english: The One who created the world, watches over it; He enjoins the people of the world to their tasks. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਗਾਡਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਅੜਾ ਦੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan jin siau gaaddiaa man leearraa deetaa |
lines.english: This body is attached to them, and we have shared our minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੀਆ ਤ ਦੀਆ ਮਾਨੁ ਜਿਨੑ ਸਿਉ ਸੇ ਸਜਨ ਕਿਉ ਵੀਸਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: leea ta deea maan jina siau se sajan kiau veesareh |
lines.english: We have shared our minds - how could I forget those friends?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਦਿਸਿ ਆਇਆ ਹੋਹਿ ਰਲੀਆ ਜੀਅ ਸੇਤੀ ਗਹਿ ਰਹਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jina dis aaeaa hohi raleea jeea setee geh raheh |
lines.english: Seeing them brings joy to my heart; I keep them clasped to my soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗਣੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਹਿ ਨੀਤਾ ਨੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagal gun avagan na koee hohi neetaa neetaa |
lines.english: They have all virtues and merits, forever and ever; they have no demerits or faults at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਮੀਤਾ ਅਵਰੀਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree saajanaa meetaa avareetaa |2|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my pure friends, the immaculate Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਹੋਵਨੑਿ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਝ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: je gun hovana saajanaa mil saajh kareejai |
lines.english: If my friends have virtues, I will share in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਾ ਕਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਾਸੁਲਾ ਕਢਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਲਈਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: gunaa kaa hovai vaasulaa kadt vaas leejai |
lines.english: One who has a basket of fragrant virtues, should enjoy its fragrance.
